description: NEW 2019 version of Bright Bots Pants. These potty training pants are designed to aid and assist you and your little one with their toilet training. They have been updated in design and sizing for the best performance ever. They look and feel just like the pants that bigger boys and girls wear and so help your child progress through training. They are made from comfortable cotton terry with softly elasticated legs and have an added absorbent layer of 100% cotton terry towel and a PUL waterproof lining in the gusset area. This terry layer gives a small amount of absorbency for accidents and the pul waterproof layer gives a little extra time to change after an accident. The training pants are washable at 40c and hard wearing and so are inexpensive. Please note: The Bright Bots training pants will be of assistance in toilet training but are not designed for multiple accidents. Sizes are approximate only as every child is different. Small approx. 12m or upto slim 18m, Medium approx. 18m or upto slim 24m, Large 2y to slim 3y, EX Large 3y to slim 4y. Care instructions: Machine washable at 40c Tumble Dry on Low heat setting.
